items.title: Heard on the Street Recap: Central Bank Shot
items.description: What Happened in Markets Today Stocks shrug off latest Powell threat. Major U.S. stock indexes posted some mild gains Monday despite earlier pressure following news that the Trump administration has launched a criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell.

items.title: Stock Market Today, Jan. 12: Markets Dip on DOJ Powell Probe, Rebound With Alphabet
items.description: On Jan. 12, 2026, Alphabet’s $4 trillion milestone helped the market recover from volatility surrounding the DOJ's investigation into Fed chair Powell, and a potential interest rate "cap" for credit cards.

items.title: American Express (AXP) Stock Drops Despite Market Gains: Important Facts to Note
items.description: American Express (AXP) closed at $359.59 in the latest trading session, marking a -4.27% move from the prior day.
